title: Fix a CrashLoopBackOff Pod
description:
## Fix a CrashLoopBackOff

A deployment `crash-app` is in `CrashLoopBackOff` because it was deployed with a broken command.

**Your task:**

Fix the `crash-app` deployment so all pods run successfully. The container should run `nginx -g 'daemon off;'` (the default nginx command). Update the deployment to remove the broken command override.

```bash
# Check what's wrong:
kubectl describe deployment crash-app
kubectl logs -l app=crash-app
```

hints.title: Remove the broken command
hints.body: Use `kubectl patch` or `kubectl edit deployment crash-app`. Remove the `command` override so nginx uses its default entrypoint.

hints.title: Alternative: kubectl set
hints.body: You can also edit the deployment directly and delete the command field.

commands.command: kubectl get deployment crash-app -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^$' || echo 0
